step_by_step_thinking:
Eye opening to pain indicates Eye Opening (E) = 2.
Abnormal flexion would indicate Motor Response (M) = 3.
Verbal response was not mentioned so we assume Verbal Response (V) = none, hence VT instead of V.
Therefore, the correct GCS score should reflect E2VTM3.
